notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes an open negotiation scene between Fang Yuan (disguised as Chen Dao) and Burning Heaven Demoness. Most events are directly observable interactions (visiting, talking, testing, flying away). The relations about Burning Heaven Demoness's plans (squeezing out Shark Demon and Su Baiman, capturing Bu Dan) are stated as her known intentions but are presented as open information revealed during the negotiation/deduction scene rather than privately hidden knowledge. No directly supported private knowledge, future-known information, or secret motives beyond what is already discussed openly in the chapter is clearly source-backed as a hidden fact.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows behaviors (Fang Yuan visits, negotiates, demonstrates wisdom path deduction; Burning Heaven Demon Woman tests him, captures him, takes him to Dengtianye) but motives are ambiguous. Observed actions are visible but inferred motives would require psychological leaps (e.g., why FY seeks cooperation, why BHDW tests him). No direct source support for specific inferred motives beyond what is observable.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed primarily focuses on individual interactions between Fang Yuan (disguised) and Fen Mo Nu, with no named collective faction/group that has a concrete stake in the seed facts. Fen Mo Nu is described as the leader of the Northern Plains Corpse Alliance branch (北原僵盟分部), but the seed does not provide source-backed facts about the Corpse Alliance as a collective actor having a stake—only Fen Mo Nu's personal plans (squeezing out Sha Mo and Su Bai Man, coveting Yu Lu blessed land). The other named groups (Song family, Cai family, Ruo Lai family) appear only as representatives arriving at Deng Tian Ye for a separate matter, with no stake shown. No collective actor's pressure can be confidently extracted from this seed alone.
IF export filter quarantined 8 legacy old-schema branches.
